offer: For Etsy sellers processing 10–50 orders/month, inconsistent stock levels cause late orders. We automate inventory replenishment instead of manual stock tracking and ordering.
problem: Inconsistent stock levels leading to late orders
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers

pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
